original_snippet_context: Discussion of the day-to-day exchange rates for the Brazilian Mil-Réis.
relevant_quote: Fechou firme o mercado, com os soberanos de 15$3500 a 15$400 e os vales, ouro, de 1$8731 a 1$8748, constando as cambiaes de papeis bancários de 15 0/8 a 15 3/16 d., contra particulares de 15 3/4 a 15 13/16 d.
justification: The text gives information on current exchange rates, which, though related to monetary debates, gives no argument for or against any particular policy like the *Caixa de Conversão*. This is purely about the current market values.
